password.min: Password must be at least {min} characters
password.minSignIn: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.minSignUp: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.number: Password must contain at least one number

confirmPassword.min: Confirm Password must be at least 8 characters

chartName.min: Chart name must be at least 2 characters
chartName.max: Chart name must not exceed 50 characters

databases.min: At least one database must be selected

hero.title: Transform Notion data into
hero.description: Build dynamic, auto-updating charts from your Notion workspace in minutes — zero coding needed.
hero.imageAlt: Example of a chart created with Notion Charts

steps.title: Link your Notion
steps.description: Securely connect to access your workspace tables and databases

steps.title: Design your visualization
steps.description: Pick from various chart styles and personalize every detail

steps.title: Share & export
steps.description: Embed live charts or export them to share with anyone

blocks.title: Simple and straightforward
blocks.description: Built for simplicity, allowing you to generate stunning charts effortlessly. Customize every aspect with just a few clicks.
items: Your charts sync automatically whenever Notion data changes
Secure by design - share charts knowing your data is protected
Works without writing a single line of code

blocks.title: Complete creative control
blocks.description: Full flexibility over your chart appearance. Select from dozens of visualization types and apply your brand identity.

blocks.title: Flexible sharing & distribution
blocks.description: Effortlessly distribute visualizations to teammates or stakeholders. Download in multiple formats or integrate seamlessly.
items: Seamlessly integrate into Notion pages or external websites
Collaborate by sharing with colleagues or clients
Download as premium PNG, JPG, or PDF files

featureCards.title: All the tools you need for data visualization
featureCards.subtitle: Feature-rich platform to unlock insights from your Notion data

cards.title: Secure
cards.description: Your privacy matters most. We never store your information — only access what you explicitly share.

cards.title: Sorting & Filtering
cards.description: Quickly organize and filter information to surface the most relevant insights.

cards.title: Responsive
cards.description: Charts automatically adjust to fit any device — perfect on phones, tablets, and computers.

cards.title: Dark mode
cards.description: Toggle between light and dark themes instantly, directly within your chart.

cta.title: Unlock your Notion data's potential
cta.description: Stop spending hours on manual charts. Visualize your workspace data instantly with our intuitive builder.
cta.features: Zero code needed • Free account to start

login.title: Welcome back
login.termsText: By clicking continue, you agree to our

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Enter your email below to create your account

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent you a confirmation email. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification email has been sent successfully. Please check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendError: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.

logout.title: Logging out
logout.description: Please wait while we sign you out of your account...

new.title: Create New Chart
new.description: Fill out the form to create a new chart from your Notion data.

delete.title: Delete Chart
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this chart? This action cannot be undone.

delete.title: Delete Connection
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this connection? This action cannot be undone. Also, remember to disconnect the integration in Notion Settings.

emptyState.title: Connect your Notion
emptyState.description: Connect your Notion to start creating charts from your data. You decide which pages we can access – we handle the rest.

emptyCharts.title: You don't have any charts yet
emptyCharts.description: Create your first chart to visualize your Notion data. It's quick and easy!

limit.title: Limit
limit.dataLimitTooltip: Maximum number of data rows to display on the chart

welcome.title: Welcome to Dashboard!
welcome.content: Let's learn how to add charts to your dashboard using drag & drop. It's simple and intuitive!

sidebarCharts.title: Your Charts
sidebarCharts.content: All your charts are located here in the sidebar. You can easily add them to your dashboard.

grabChart.title: Grab a Chart
grabChart.content: Hover over a chart and hold down the left mouse button. Then drag the chart onto the dashboard.

dropZone.title: Drop It Here
dropZone.content: Drag the chart to any part of the dashboard and release the mouse button. The chart will automatically position itself in the grid.

resizeChart.title: Resize Charts
resizeChart.content: Hover over the bottom-right corner of a chart – an icon will appear. Click and drag to resize the chart.

moveChart.title: Move Charts Around
moveChart.content: You can also drag charts within the dashboard to rearrange them. Just click and move!

complete.title: All Done!
complete.content: Now you know how to work with charts on your dashboard. Create, drag, and customize your perfect dashboard!
